title: Empty-state for the activity feed

grounding.statement: A first-run user with no logged activity saw a blank panel and assumed the app had failed to load.
grounding.decision_test: A brand-new user reads the screen as 'nothing here yet', not 'something broke'.

before_after.label: After
before_after.html: <svg width="100%" height="60" role="img" aria-label="illustrated empty state"><rect width="100%" height="60" rx="8" fill="#eef"/></svg>

questions_carried: Should the empty state offer a sample-data CTA, or stay purely informational?
